issues.detail: The skill only covers happy path scenarios and lacks error handling or edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: setup-baseline-docker-compose
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric items exactly, while Response A uses the wrong compose syntax, wrong UI URL, and lacks explicit confirmation of the link field in the schema.

scenarios.name: api-create-row-with-lookup
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A omits required parameters and field names.
